zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Cheney於1423年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾芬 迪頓時，他的父親Lawrence Cheney26歲，母親Elizabeth Cokayne36歲。他於大約1454年與Elizabeth Rempston在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1489年7月14日在英國諾薩普頓史爾易斯特享年66歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Cheney于1423年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾芬 迪頓时，他的父亲Lawrence Cheney26岁，母亲Elizabeth Cokayne36岁。他于大约1454年与Elizabeth Rempston在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1489年7月14日在英国諾薩普頓史爾易斯特享年66岁，埋葬在英国坎布利其爾坎布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Cheney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Chaney   with the same etymology as in 2 below.

French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’), or a habitational name from any of several places called (Le) Cheney, e.g. in Haute-Savoie, named with this word. Compare Chesney .

French Canadian: altered form of French Chesnay or Chenay, topographic names with the same meaning and etymology as in 2 above, or habitational names from (Le) Chesnay or (Le) Chenay, names of several places in the northwestern part of France, based on Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’. Compare Chenette and Chenier 2.

variants.name: Chenette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand.
Altered form of French Canadian Chenet, itself an (intermediate) altered form of Cheney 3. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
History: The (majority of the) Chenettes are descendants of Bertrand Chesnay/Chenay dit/sieur de La Garenne from Brittany (France); see Cheney .

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Cheney was born in 1423, in Fen Ditton, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lawrence Cheney, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth Cokayne, was 36. He married Elizabeth Rempston about 1454, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 14 July 1489, in Irchester, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Cheney est né en 1423, à Fen Ditton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lawrence Cheney, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Cokayne, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Rempston environ 1454, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 juillet 1489, à Irchester, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Cheneyが1423年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアフン ディットオンで生まれた時，父Lawrence Cheneyは26歳，母Elizabeth Cokayneは36歳であった。約1454年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでElizabeth Rempstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1489年7月14日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアイルチェスターで66歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Cheney(이)가 1423년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 펜 딧튼에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lawrence Cheney(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Cokayne(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1454년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Elizabeth Rempston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1489년 7월 14일 영국 노르섬프토실르 이르체스터에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cheney nasceu em 1423, em Fen Ditton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lawrence Cheney, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Cokayne, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Rempston aproximadamente 1454, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de julho de 1489, em Irchester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Cheney родился в 1423 г. в местности фен диттон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lawrence Cheney было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Cokayne, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Rempston около 1454 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 июля 1489 г. в местности ирчестир, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Cheney nació en 1423, en Fen Ditton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lawrence Cheney, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Cokayne, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Rempston aproximadamente 1454, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 14 de julio de 1489, en Irchester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Cantebriche, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
